title: Connect boards column but it's to connect different items in the same board
excerpt:
I would like to see a function where you can add a ‘Connect boards’ column and connect it to the same board as the original board. Then you can link items that are situated in the same board.

posts.author: Viv-maas (Vivianne)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to see a function where you can add a ‘Connect boards’ column and connect it to the same board as the original board. Then you can link items that are situated in the same board.

It is an option no to add the column and connect an item. However, the column doesn’t make a two-way connection. Therefore, you need to connect both items individually. It would be so great if connecting one item would automatically connect the other item as well.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great suggestion! (I’ve hit my voting limit so can’t upvote hopefully this comment helps with traffic)
